allow: PowerShell($path = "c:\\Users\\aksha\\.gemini\\antigravity\\scratch\\event-registration - Copy\\src\\components\\ZoneRulesManager.jsx"; $text = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $matches = [regex]::Matches\($text, '[^\\x00-\\x7F]'\); $unique = $matches | ForEach-Object { $_.Value } | Sort-Object -Unique; $unique | ForEach-Object { $b = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($_\); "$_ -> bytes: $\($b -join ','\) len:$\($b.Length\)" })
